mappings.note: Confident Maya, Friday sun, code on laptop. Establishes baseline lighting.
Deploy party. Maya's triumph, hands raised with coffee mug. 5:00 PM clock.
Three diverse users confirming. Normalcy. Maya absent.
Climax. Maya panicked face LARGE, red phone notifications, bug creature at click/fetch intersection.
Maya alone, lamp circle (amber), red screen glow, empty chair for the Formalist.
Two-shot. Maya leaning forward, Formalist with tablet, purple glow, faint constellation foreshadow.
Maya in profile, two monitors (TLA+ code + state diagram), purple wash, focused posture.
Climax. TLC Crystal Computer, green beam, bug in spotlight, Maya hand-to-mouth reaction, active constellation.
Maya points at verified diagram, bug trapped in box, TypeScript matches verified model.
Wide panoramic, diverse users, constellation stretched across sky, Maya small but looking up.
Terminal VERIFIED stamp rotated -8 degrees, meta-constellation pattern, Maya looking at stamp.
Each SVG has explicit dimensions and palette elements. File existence + parseability = type check.
Background #0d1117 + accent per state. Validator asserts palette discipline.
BeatForPanel(panelIndex) determines facial expression, posture, lighting. Mechanically tracked via panelIndex; visually verified by named reviewer via human_review.
Primary mitigation for Known Limitations L4 in the visual-comms domain. Each panel has emotional_beat, character focus, background role, continuity declarations.
Both versions coexist. v1 is the original creative work; v3 is the verified packet with Aesthetic Invariants.

mappings.source: v2 panels kept as verified model artifact
mappings.note: v2 was verified as a state-machine model. The structural artifact is preserved; only the narrative labeling de-prioritizes v2 as primary.
OUT_OF_SCOPE for visual quality. Reviewer with named competence must sign before packet is shippable as primary narrative.
Aesthetic Invariants in v3 are the proposed mitigation for L4 in the visual-comms domain.
Maya's hand-still-on-keyboard posture in panel 1 becomes the celebrate-hands-raised posture in panel 2. Same head dimensions, same hoodie color.
Red alarm glow -> red lingering lamp circle -> purple tablet glow replacing red. The Methodology replaces the alarm.
Faint constellation in panel 6 (foreshadow) -> active constellation with red bug-node in panel 8 (climax) -> constellation stretched across sky in panel 10 (world-scale).
